description: Billing platform data models — customers, invoices, products, payments, and charge workflows. Property keys use original billing API field names.

classes.name: Customer
classes.description: Billing customer/client account with balances, wallets, and service history

classes.name: Invoice
classes.description: Document header — invoices, receipts, credit notes. Composite key: docType/docID

props.label: Document Type
props.description: D55=Tax Invoice, D56=Receipt, D47=Credit Note, D33=Proforma

classes.name: Invoice Line
classes.description: Document line item. Composite key: docType+docID+lineID

classes.name: CMV Document
classes.description: Balance/movement document for customer accounting. Multi-currency with ILS, user currency, and USD

classes.name: Reference Token
classes.description: Tracking/reference token for invoices, receipts, charges, and other workflows

classes.name: Wallet
classes.description: Customer payment method — credit cards, IBANs, wire transfer details

classes.name: Balance
classes.description: Customer balance by year and currency (cstCount table)

classes.name: Charge Log
classes.description: Charge execution log entry — provider responses and transaction status

classes.name: Service Product
classes.description: Service-specific product instance linked to a customer subscription

notes.api_pattern: Billing uses a custom WebService command pattern (/api?cmd={command}&sel_company={company}), not standard REST routes. The sel_company parameter selects the billing database (omc, gns, tyco).
notes.composite_keys: Invoices and lines use composite keys (docType+docID, docType+docID+lineID) rather than single IDs.
notes.multi_currency: Three currency layers: ILS (local), user currency (customer's coinID), USD (system). CMV documents track all three.
notes.prop_table: Many customer properties are stored in a key-value prop table rather than direct columns. The genesis maps them as flat properties.
notes.multi_tenant: sel_company parameter (omc/gns/tyco) selects different database prefixes for multi-tenant isolation.
notes.field_naming: Property keys use original billing API field names (camelCase) for zero-transformation data flow. Provider mapping is only needed for computed/derived fields.
